features.name: SQLite Database Schema
features.description: SQLAlchemy ORM models for users, projects, and tasks. Uses SQLite with file-based storage. Models: User (email, hashed_password, name), Project (name, description, owner_id), Task (title, description, project_id, assignee_id, status).

work_history.note: Models verified: User, Project, Task all importable. Relationships defined. SQLite configured. Tests 26/26 pass.

features.completion_notes: All models (User, Project, Task) importable. Relationships and SQLite storage configured. 26 pytest tests pass including model tests.

features.name: Frontend Project Setup
features.description: Next.js 14 app with Tailwind CSS. App Router structure with pages for login, register, dashboard, projects, and tasks. API client using axios with empty baseURL and Next.js rewrites to proxy /api/* to backend port 8000. Use next.config.mjs (not .ts).

work_history.note: Next.js 14 static export configured. next.config.mjs with webpack alias. api.ts uses empty baseURL. 11 pages build successfully.

features.completion_notes: Next.js 14 static export. Tailwind CSS. App Router with login, register, dashboard, projects, tasks pages. api.ts with empty baseURL. Production build succeeds (11 pages).

features.name: Health Check and App Config
features.description: GET /api/health returns {status: "healthy"}. Backend entry point at src/fixture/main.py.

work_history.note: Health endpoint at /api/health returns status:healthy. All routers registered (auth, projects, tasks). Server running on port 8000. test_health passes.

features.completion_notes: GET /api/health returns {status: healthy}. All routers registered. test_health.py passes.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: POST /api/auth/register accepts {email, password, name}, creates user with bcrypt-hashed password, returns JWT. POST /api/auth/login validates credentials, returns {token}. GET /api/users/me returns current user profile. JWT middleware extracts user from Authorization: Bearer header.

work_history.note: Auth verified: register, login, JWT, get_current_user, /api/auth/me, /api/users/me all working. 7 auth tests pass.

features.completion_notes: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me, GET /api/users/me all implemented. bcrypt + JWT. Protected endpoints reject unauthenticated. 7 tests pass.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Overview page at /dashboard showing project and task counts with quick links.

work_history.note: Dashboard page exists at /dashboard. Shows project and task counts. Uses Layout component. Fetches from /api/auth/me, /api/projects, /api/tasks. Build succeeds.

features.completion_notes: Dashboard page at /dashboard. Shows project/task counts with quick links. Production build succeeds.

features.name: Navigation and Layout
features.description: Sidebar navigation with route highlighting and logout button. AuthGuard component protects authenticated routes. Layout component wraps all authenticated pages.

work_history.note: Sidebar.tsx with route highlighting and logout. AuthGuard.tsx and Layout.tsx components exist. All components used in pages. Production build with all 11 pages succeeds.

features.completion_notes: Sidebar with route highlighting and logout button. AuthGuard protects authenticated routes. Layout wraps all authenticated pages. Production build succeeds.

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Full CRUD for projects. POST /api/projects creates project with owner_id from auth. GET /api/projects lists user's projects. GET /api/projects/{id} returns single project. DELETE /api/projects/{id} removes project. Frontend pages: /projects (list), /projects/new (create form).

work_history.note: Full CRUD: GET/POST /api/projects, GET/DELETE /api/projects/{id}. Auth enforced. User isolation tested. Frontend pages: /projects and /projects/new exist. 7 project tests pass.

features.completion_notes: Full CRUD for projects. Auth enforced. User isolation. Frontend pages /projects and /projects/new. 7 tests pass.

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Full CRUD for tasks with project assignment. POST /api/tasks creates task with project_id. GET /api/tasks lists user's tasks. DELETE /api/tasks/{id} removes task. Frontend pages: /tasks (list), /tasks/new (create form with project selector).

work_history.note: Full CRUD: GET/POST /api/tasks, GET/DELETE /api/tasks/{id}. Project assignment via project_id. Auth enforced. Frontend pages: /tasks and /tasks/new exist. 7 task tests pass.

features.completion_notes: Full CRUD for tasks with project assignment. Auth enforced. User isolation. Frontend pages /tasks and /tasks/new. 7 tests pass.
